name: entropy-ratio-clipping-rl
description: Soft global constraint using entropy ratio clipping for stable RL training
paperTitle: Entropy Ratio Clipping for Stable RL
content:
## Entropy Ratio Clipping for Stable RL

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.05591 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.05591

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
